name: per-rule canary: rule promoted via /promote-standard or /pr-corpus-learn defaults to rule_state:warn-only at first activation
command: mkdir -p tree/google && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/promote-standard.sh" --source google-tsguide --section 5.2 --tree "$PWD/tree" && grep -E "rule_state: warn-only" tree/google/tsguide.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
